results.input_data: Navigate to the Salesforce UI and Create 2 Contact records in Salesforce having below field values filled using the available picklist values: Name, Email, All Phone fields and Address - House Number & Street, City as Prayagraj, State as Uttar Pradesh and Country as India. Once saved, return the Salesforce RecordIDs
results.expected_output: Record or operation completed successfully in Salesforce with valid data returned
